arts.ttl: Analysis: How Maresca has made Chelsea title contenders
arts.sum: In the narrow defeat to Liverpool, he again started with Gusto as one of the No 8s and this time changed it mid-match to put Fernandez here, wresting control of midfield in the second half until Chelsea had the highest pass-completion rate (88.1 per cent) ever recorded by an away side at Anfield in the Premier League. But at Chelsea, Maresca has embraced the talents of his squad and, like Slot, found a balance between calm possession and organised chaos, allowing his players to attack quickly in the transition but retaining the ball when the game state demands a shift in momentum.

arts.ttl: Howard Webb gives Chelsea final Wilfred Ndidi red card verdict as VAR mistake highlighted
arts.sum: Although the visitors were a goal up at the time of Ndidi's foul on Cole Palmer, Chelsea players were demanding he should be sent off, but Andy Madley chose to only show him a yellow card. "Overall, when there is bad intention, I think the punishment has to be different." Although the incident was a number of weeks ago, how VAR reached their decision has been revealed.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola's 'I'm going to stop' bombshell as Arsenal and Chelsea watch on
arts.sum: In a significant revelation about his future, Pep Guardiola has admitted that he will not coach any other football team after his tenure at Manchester City . I'm not saying [no] in the future but I’m not going to go to another country [to coach], I won't have the energy.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's Reece James and Man United's Harry Maguire team up for £31.5m deal, it sums up modern football
Chelsea battle Liverpool for defender keen on Premier League
arts.sum: Chelsea and Liverpool are interested in Joel Ordonez, who could be on the move as early as January, according to Belgian media. It is claimed that both clubs have been scouting Ordonez and that a January move to the Premier League is a distinct possibility.

arts.ttl: Who are FC Astana and why is Chelsea's Conference League game kicking off so early?
arts.sum: Chelsea will be bidding to make it five wins from five in the Europa Conference League when they make the 7,000-mile round trip to Astana on Thursday. After the trip to Astana, the Blues host Irish side Shamrock Rovers next Thursday in their final game before the knockout phase in the new year.

arts.ttl: Chelsea co-owner Todd Boehly threatens to 'gatecrash' £550m move in jaw-dropping deal
arts.sum: Chelsea co-owner Todd Boehly is reportedly considering "gate-crashing" the £550million sale of British national newspaper The Telegraph in the latest move of the US billionaire's business ventures. Two people have told the Financial Times that Boehly had held talks with Efune's team to discuss working together, but it's also been suggested the Chelsea owner would prefer to complete The Telegraph deal alone.

arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea will only be able to sign 'strong' forward from Champions League club for £69m
arts.sum: Do they even need him right now?

arts.ttl: Listen in on VAR that decided Caicedo should NOT be sent off against Spurs
arts.sum: Speaking on Match Officials Mic'd Up, Howard Webb believes Moises Caicedo didn't endanger Pape Sarr so there was no need for a red card, however the Chelsea midfielder should've seen seen a yellow card at least.

arts.ttl: Webb: 'Reckless' Caicedo challenge vs Spurs didn't deserve a red card
arts.sum: PGMOL chief Howard Webb believes it was right for Moises Caicedo to avoid a red card against Tottenham during Chelsea's 4-3 victory on Sunday.
